polar and equatorial radii for Neptune's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
the models summarized in this file assume the symmetric Voyager wind profile from Tollefson et al. (2018, Icarus 311) Table 1.
the polar and equatorial radii in this file come from random draws in j2 and j4 from the Jacobson (2009, AJ 137) error ellipsoid,
followed by direct integration of Equation (3) from the Voyager 2 occultation point reported in Lindal (1992, AJ 103) to either the equator or the pole.
index         r_pol_km          r_eq_km               j2               j4
